regions.text: Let's change the scale to 10,000 years. (Diagram: Graph showing a sharp upward turn around 700-400 BC).
2,500 years ago, people developed clear ideas about themselves and the world. (Illustration: Bust of a Greek philosopher).
In Greece: The Iliad, Socrates, and Plato. In Palestine: Amos, Hosea, and Isaiah. (Diagram: Stone tablet with biblical text).
“You may not make for yourselves an image of anything...” (Deuteronomy 5:8). image: a picture or sculpture. FUTURE: will imagine. PRESENT: imagine(s). PAST: imagined.
